text: Competitive and revenue risks are evidenced by declining top-line and profitability metrics. Revenue decreased 1.39% year-over-year in Q3 2025 to $94,036,000,000, while net income declined 5.43% to $23,434,000,000. This contraction suggests potential market share pressure or pricing challenges in key product categories. Despite maintaining healthy margins with gross margin at 46.49% and operating margin at 29.99%, the sequential revenue decline from Q2 2025's $95,359,000,000 indicates possible demand softness. The stock's one-year return of -5.80% significantly underperformed the broader market benchmark return of 13.56%, reflecting investor concerns about growth sustainability and competitive positioning in core hardware and services segments.
